name: system-deep-loop
description: Unified deep-loop parent hub: the single advisor-routable home for active deep-loop personas, routing to eight modes across five workflow families over a nested runtime/ infrastructure layer (formerly the separate deep-loop-runtime skill, merged 2026-07-08). research (outward web+code iterative investigation → research/ artifacts), review (iterative review loop → P0/P1/P2 findings + verdict), ai-council (multi-seat planning deliberation → ai-council/ artifacts), alignment (read-only-by-default conformance against a named standard authority → alignment/ artifacts), and four improvement lanes on the deep-improvement packet (agent-improvement, model-benchmark, skill-benchmark, ai-system-improvement). The hub holds no per-mode convergence, state, or synthesis logic; each mode keeps its own contract in its packet and is reachable via its /deep:* command and native agent.
trigger_examples: run a deep research loop on this topic
iteratively investigate X across web and code until convergence
deep review this branch for release readiness
iterative code audit with P0/P1/P2 findings
convene the AI council to plan this
audit artifacts against a named standard authority
run a deep alignment conformance audit
improve and score this agent, then promote or rollback
benchmark this model across prompt frameworks
benchmark how well this skill is routed
refine a non-dev AI system package
